title: Sendbird Message
description: A message sent in a Sendbird channel.

type.description: Type of message: MESG (text), FILE (file), ADMM (admin).

channel_url.description: URL of the channel containing this message.

created_at.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) when the message was sent.

updated_at.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) when the message was last updated.

data.description: Custom data string attached to the message.

mention_type.description: Type of user mention: 'users' for specific users, 'channel' for all members.
